channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: China tech giant Tencent sees Q1 profit jump after AI bets
item.description: Tencent reported a 21% surge in quarterly net profit, reaching 58.1 billion yuan, driven by significant investments in the booming artificial intelligence sector. The tech giant is actively competing in AI, unveiling model upgrades and reportedly considering … [Intel, Tencent]

item.title: Oracle Stock Drops 3.6% to $186.83 as AI Spending Concerns Weigh on Cloud Giant Amid Market Volatility
item.description: NEW YORK — Oracle Corp. shares closed down 3.62 percent at $186.83 on Wednesday, May 13, 2026, extending recent weakness as investors continued to scrutinize the software giant's aggressive capital spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure and cloud … [Oracle, Intel]

item.title: Tencent profit misses forecasts as higher spend offsets gaming gains
